title: Become My Closet
overview: Takamine is basically a goddess. Shirota is like an NPC, but he glimpses her bare breasts. Weirdness ensues...

title: Let Me Redo It Until I'm Satisfied.
overview: It's Shirota's first day as Takamine's closet. How is he even supposed to pull off what she's asking of him?

title: I Want You to Enjoy the Very Best
overview: Shirota learns how much effort Takamine has put in to be who she is. Later she helps him get first place.

title: Don't Be Dense, Be Sharp.
overview: When Shirota gets sick, Takamine nurses him with surprising devotion, making him wonder if it means something.

title: I Want You to Make This Cat Purr, Meow.
overview: Shirota is over at Takamine's place, but then the lightning knocks out the power and sends her into his arms.

title: Honey, Let Me Wash Your Back.
overview: Takamine and Shirota roleplay newly-weds. She escalates things by joining him in the bath to wash his back.

title: Even That Which Isn't Visible From There
overview: Takamine and Shirota talk about the future. When he says he's set on work, not college, she briefly looks sad.

title: You Two Seem Quite Intimate
overview: Shirota runs into Ellie, a friend from grade school. They're hanging out in the park where Takamine sees them.

title: Let Me Do It!!
overview: Takamine challenges Shirota to a water balloon fight, the loser has to obey the winner. What will it be?

title: It Rains, and Shirota Freezes Up
overview: The class will put on the play Cinderella. Naturally, Takamine will be Cinderella, but who will be the prince?

title: I'll Let You Do a Dry Run
overview: To calm Shirota's nerves, Takamine goes into the haunted house with him. It works, but now where is Ouji?

title: Only Look At Me
overview: Can Shirota make it to the end of Cinderella without messing up? Near the end, something unexpected happens!
